title: Why Australia Enshrined ‘a Succulent Chinese Meal’ Rant in Its Archive
summary_full: A clip of the con man Jack Karlson delivering a theatrical soliloquy while being arrested in 1991 has been deemed one of the country’s important cultural recordings.
summary_public: A clip of the con man Jack Karlson delivering a theatrical soliloquy while being arrested in 1991 has been deemed one of the country’s important cultural recordings.
